#3 CHAITIN--REPTR DIANA PADILLA--CC FOR JT--ALL PRESENT-- STIPULATED SETTLEMENT REACHED AS FOLLOWS: STIPULATED JUDGMT FOR PLTF AND VS DEF FOR POSSESSION OF PREMISES--W/P S/E ON FOLLOWING TERMS--DEF TO VAC ON OR BEFORRE 8AM JUN 30, 1993 AND DELIVER KEYS TO PLTF ATTY. DEF WAIVES SECURITY DEPOSIT AND INTEREST THEREON. EACH SIDE WAIVES ATTY FEES AND COSTS. PLTF WAIVES BACK RENT FROM DEC 92 THRU JUN 93. IF DEF IS OUT ON TIME, PLTF TO VAC JUDGMT AND DISM. S/E"S WAIVED BY DEFT. MUTUAL RELEASE OF EACH SIDE AGAINST THE OTHER. STIP TO BE SIGNED BY DEF BY 3PM IN PLTF ATTY OFC TODAY. PLTF ATTY TO PREPARE NECESSARY PAPERS.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAIROBI, SAFI WA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 120 HAIGHT STREET, SF, CA, STAYED UNTIL JUN-30-1993, LEASE FORFEITED
